variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 14504 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 14504 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 14504 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P124866 Air Filter, Safety | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14504
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson Safety Filters? Safety filters have two functions: to act as a backup to the primary filter and to protect the engine during primary filter servicing. • Serve as a backup filter in case of primary filter damage or improper installation. • Prevent contaminants from entering the clean side of the air intake system during primary filter servicing. • Designed to plug rapidly if contamination finds its way past the primary filter, alerting operators about an issue. • Recommend that safety filters are replaced with every third primary filter change unless there has been a failure of the primary filter.

variants.title: FIL Filter HP 468 Filter Insert | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14504
variants.description: Genuine FIL Filter HP 468. Easy to install and replace, the HP 468 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4554M Air Filter, Secondary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14504
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4554M axial seal secondary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
